title: PlayerTitle
description: A somewhat handy player title plugin
body:
![Supported Core](https://img.shields.io/badge/Supported%20Core-Spigot|Folia-blue)
![Supported Versions](https://img.shields.io/badge/Supported%20Versions-1.7.x--26.x-blue)
![Paid Version](https://img.shields.io/badge/Paid%20Version-Partially%20Paid-blue)
![Purchase Price](https://img.shields.io/badge/dynamic/json?url=https%3A%2F%2Fafdian.com%2Fapi%2Fcreator%2Fget-plan-skus%3Fplan_id%3D8aacfbc8589a11eca01952540025c377&query=%24.data.plan.show_price&suffix=CNY%20&label=Purchase%20Price)
![Latest Version](https://img.shields.io/badge/dynamic/json?url=https%3A%2F%2Fricedoc.handyplus.cn%2Fversion.json&query=%24.PlayerTitle&prefix=v&label=Latest%20Version)

### 1. Introduction

> PlayerTitle - A quite useful player title plugin  
> Server admins can easily create titles and manage them through GUI  
> Players can purchase and use titles through title shop GUI and title storage GUI

![PlayerTitle](https://ricedoc.handyplus.cn/plugin/PlayerTitle/0.webp)

1. Supports both **MySQL** and local **SQLite** storage
2. Built-in **Title Shop** with different shop types
3. Built-in **Title Management** GUI interface
4. Built-in **Title Storage** system
5. Built-in **Title Quantity Reward** feature with GUI management
6. **Specific Title Card** feature - players can use title cards to obtain corresponding timed titles
7. **Random Title Card** feature - multiple types, randomly given
8. Multiple purchase methods: **Vault economy**, **PlayerPoints**, **any items**, **title coins**, **permissions**, and **events**
9. Supports both **time-limited** and **permanent** title sales
10. 99% customizable messages and lore text
11. Performance optimized, runs well on multiple servers (check with `timings on`)
12. Supports **PlaceholderAPI** variables
13. Deleting a title automatically removes players' purchased versions and associated buffs
14. Deleting title buffs automatically removes them from players who purchased the title
15. Optimized title shop display - **purchased titles are hidden only for that player**
16. Toggle for displaying titles in chat
17. Toggle for displaying titles in TAB and above players' heads
18. Title BUFF feature, [click to view](https://ricedoc.handyplus.cn/wiki/PlayerTitle/buff/)
19. Customizable **acquisition messages** for titles (supports bar, msg, and title message types) (2.4.6+)
20. Customizable **material** for each title (2.4.5+)
21. Customizable **particle effects** for each title (2.3.0+)
22. Uses **UUID** for data storage (4.0.0+)
23. Data security with automatic full backups to backUp folder (4.5.2+)

### 2. Plugin Dependencies

**All are optional**

PlaceholderAPI PAPI Variables  
[SpigotMc](https://www.spigotmc.org/resources/6245/)

Vault Economy Plugin (requires base plugins like Essentials, CMI, etc.)  
[SpigotMc](https://www.spigotmc.org/resources/34315)

PlayerPoints (requires 3.0.0+)  
[SpigotMc](https://www.spigotmc.org/resources/playerpoints.80745/)

PlayerCurrency Multi-currency Plugin (requires 1.0.3+)  
[Click to view](https://ricedoc.handyplus.cn/wiki/PlayerCurrency/README)
